World Shakers & Icon Makers: Why did Napoleon always carry a pencil? In case he had to draw his sword!
Why was Einstein's hair so messy? Because he had too many brainstorms!
What do you call a sleeping bull at the Great Wall of China? A bulldozer!
What do you call a dinosaur that crashes his car? Tyrannosaurus Wrecks...
What did Shakespeare say when he couldn't think of a good play? To be or not to be... stumped!
What do you call a Roman emperor who loves to garden? Julius Seeder!
What did the Wright Brothers say after their first flight? This idea really took off!
What do you call a knight who loves to read? Sir Read-a-lot!
Creature Feature - Fur, fins, feathers a: Why don't elephants use computers? Because they're afraid of the mouse!
Why don't oysters share? Because they're shellfish!
Why don't teddy bears ever order dessert? Because they're always stuffed!
What do you call a pig that does karate? A pork chop!
What do you call a cow with no legs? Ground beef!
What do you call a bear with no teeth? A gummy bear!
What do you call a snake that works for the government? A civil serpent!
Why don't penguins like talking to strangers at parties? They find it hard to break the ice!
Why don't leopards play hide and seek? Because they're always spotted!
Why don't bats live alone? Because they like to hang out together!
Days That Slay: What do you call a Christmas tree that knows karate? Spruce Lee!
What do you call a Halloween ghost's favorite dessert? I-scream!
Why don't Easter eggs ever tell jokes? They'd crack each other up!
Why was the New Year's resolution so tired? It had been working out all year!
Why don't birthday candles ever get cold? They're always getting lit up!
Full Beast Mode: What's a weightlifter's favorite type of music? Heavy metal!
What do you call a horse that can do magic tricks? A show jumper!
What's the difference between a fish and a Olympic swimmer? One swims for fun, the other swims for gold!
Why did the soccer player bring string to the game? So they could tie the score!
What's a boxer's favorite drink? Punch!
What's the best thing about Switzerland's Olympic team? I don't know, but their flag is a big plus!
Big Brain Energy: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What did the light bulb say when it was invented? That's a bright idea!
Why did the computer go to the doctor? It had a virus!
Why don't robots ever panic? They have nerves of steel!
Why did the scarecrow win a Nobel Prize? He was outstanding in his field!
What did the big flower say to the little flower? Hi, bud!
Why was the belt arrested? For holding up a pair of pants!
What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta!
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired!
What's orange and sounds like a parrot? A carrot!
Beyond Earth: Why didn't the sun go to college? Because it already had a million degrees!
How do you organize a space party? You planet!
What do you call a tick on the moon? A luna-tick!
What's an astronaut's favorite part of a computer? The space bar!
What do you call an alien with three eyes? An aliiien!
How do you get a baby astronaut to sleep? You rocket!
Why didn't the moon eat dinner? Because it was full!
What's a light-year? The same as a regular year, but with fewer calories!
What do you call a crazy spaceman? An astro-nut!
The What Zone: Why was the broom late for work? It swept through its alarm.
What do you call a goat that knows karate? A karate kid!
Why did the grape stop in the hallway? It ran out of juice.
How do you tickle a robot? With a gigglebyte.
What do cows text with? Moo-bile phones.
What do you call a talking sandwich? Weird... but you’d still listen.
What did the shadow say to the flashlight? 'Stop following me!'
Mother Nature's Meltdowns: What did the tornado say to the sports car? Want to go for a spin!
What did one earthquake say to another? It's not my fault!
What's a tornado's favorite game? Twister, of course!
What did the avalanche say when it was running late? Sorry, I got a little carried away!
Why don't geysers ever keep secrets? They always blow off steam!
Why don't blizzards ever win races? They always get snowed under!
History's Mic Drop Moments: What did Christopher Columbus say when he got to America? 'Wow, my GPS was really off!'
Why was the Moon Landing such a big deal? Because it was one giant leap for dad jokes!
What did the cavemen say when they invented the wheel? 'This is really going to roll out big!'
Why did the Renaissance artists paint so many portraits? Because selfies hadn't been invented yet!
Why was the printing press so popular? It made headlines!
Why did the first cities get crowded? Because nobody invented traffic lights yet.
Vibes, Beats & Brushes: What do you call a painting by a cat? A paw-trait!
What do you call a musical insect? A hum-bug!
What's a DJ's favorite vegetable? Beets!
Why did the artist become a detective? They were great at drawing conclusions.
What's the difference between a fish and a piano? You can't tuna fish, but you can tune a piano!
